entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop, Pennisetum glaucum, grown in West Africa and attacked by numerous insect pests

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: Over 100 species of insects that attack pearl millet, some of which are of economic importance

entities.name: MILLET STEM BORER
entities.description: Coniesta ignefusalis Hampson, a major insect pest of pearl millet

entities.name: EARHEAD CATERPILLAR
entities.description: Heliocheilus albipunctella de Joannis, a major insect pest of pearl millet

entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: A region in West Africa where research on pearl millet pests has been conducted

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The broader geographical region where pearl millet is cultivated

entities.name: CULTURAL OPERATIONS
entities.description: Farmer-adopted practices used to reduce insect damage

entities.name: RESEARCH TRIALS AND EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Scientific methods for pest control derived from research trials

entities.name: INSECT DAMAGE
entities.description: The negative impact and loss caused by insect pests on the crop

entities.name: CONTROL STRATEGY
entities.description: The overall approach adopted by farmers or researchers to manage and reduce pest impact
